title: Renewable share of German power use climbs to 52.3% in first half | Reuters
description: Renewable energy accounted for 52.3% of Germany's power consumption in the first six months of the year, up 3.1 points from a year earlier, on higher solar production and lower overall electricity usage, data showed on Tuesday.
bodyText: Reporting by Vera Eckert; Editing by Conor Humphries Our Standards: The Thomson Reuters Trust Principles., opens new tab
